.file-embed.background: rgb(237, 235, 229) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-file-title::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.nav-files-container.background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-files-container.background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px)

.nav-header.background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.nav-header.background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none), oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 1px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 15px)

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item.background: oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar-item::after.background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.status-bar-item::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.status-bar::before.background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.status-bar::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-content.background: rgb(250, 247, 239) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.background: oklch(0.916763 0.00824887 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb::after.background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
.view-header-breadcrumb::after.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: oklch(0.965356 0.0102416 none) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box
